content: Both Self-Refine for LLMs and Reflexion autonomous agents can be unified under a layered 'self-improvement stack' where Self-Refine acts as the low-level, task-specific polishing engine for individual outputs, while Reflexion integrates Self-Refine’s iteration with long-term dynamic memory to build agent-level cumulative learning over time. This layered framework enables fully autonomous AI improvement that requires no external human supervision or additional training data at any layer of the stack.
